## Summary
Describe the changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have updated BOTH `front_end/src/schema/graph.ts` and `back_end/internal/graph/schema.go` (if applicable).
- [ ] I have run front-end Zod validation and verified the UI.
- [ ] I have run back-end Go tests (`go test ./...`) and verified the compiler.
- [ ] My code follows the "vibe coding with tight contracts" philosophy.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
